ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency's data was last updated */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Type of blockchain (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency (e.g., SHA-256, Ethash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" INTEGER /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the market data entry */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous time period */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the cryptocurrency by market capitalization */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the ranking entry */,
  "change_in_rank" INTEGER /* Change in ranking compared to the previous time period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Historical price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the price history entry */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency within the given time period */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price history data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volume" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the trading volume entry */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading volume data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the access log entry */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message for the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
